extraction.one_line_summary: ARNDT Nikias won from reduced breakaway sprint after Stybar caught inside final km, while Edet's 6:24 GC deficit allowed 9-minute gap to create new race leader
tactical_patterns: Astana failed to defend Lopez's red jersey despite only 6:24 gap to Edet, allowing 9+ minute advantage revealing GC miscalculation
Treacherous descent eliminated breakaway sprinters Sanchez/Jakobsen while climber Stetina attacked mid-climb, showing course reading skill
Multiple late attacks inside 10km fractured breakaway cohesion but all caught sub-1km, indicating too-early moves on technical finish
Arndt sprinted seated on wet roads while others jumped, showing equipment/technique advantage in slippery conditions

rider_signals.EDET Nicolas: positive: Prioritized stage racing over GC mathematics, fortuitous result gave him red jersey by 9+ minutes
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: Astana's defensive riding lost red jersey to rider 6:24 down, catastrophic gap management
rider_signals.STETINA Peter: positive: Solo climber attacked mid-ascent gaining 30 seconds, correctly identified terrain advantage before regrouping
rider_signals.STYBAR Zdenek: negative: Caught Ludvigsen but couldn't hold off sprint inside 1km, mistimed final acceleration
rider_signals.TUSVELD Martijn: negative: Crashed on wet roundabout while leading promising counter-attack, overcooked technical section
rider_signals.ARNDT Nikias: positive: Seated sprint technique on wet roads proved faster than traditional jump, unusual tactical execution
